task_completion.description: Verify that the agent has opened the edit page for the 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser shows the WordPress/WooCommerce 'Edit product' page with the title 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' or SKU 'WBH-001' visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent accessed the correct directory to upload the images.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file upload dialog or file manager window is visible, showing the path 'Documents/ProductPhotos' (or '/home/ga/Documents/ProductPhotos') and the image files 'headphones_main.jpg' and 'headphones_lifestyle.jpg'.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'headphones_main.jpg' is set as the main product image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right sidebar of the product edit page, under the 'Product image' section, a thumbnail of the uploaded headphones image is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'headphones_lifestyle.jpg' is added to the product gallery.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right sidebar of the product edit page, under the 'Product gallery' section, a thumbnail of the uploaded lifestyle headphones image is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent saved the changes to the product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Product updated.' success message is visible at the top of the WordPress edit page, or the 'Update' button has been clicked with the new images present in the sidebar.

integrity.description: Check that the agent used the web browser GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the WordPress web interface and standard file picker dialogs, rather than executing terminal commands or scripts to upload the images.

integrity.description: Check that actual image files were uploaded.
integrity.visual_evidence: The thumbnails in the WordPress media library or product page show actual photos of headphones, not broken image icons or text placeholders.

integrity.description: Check that the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success message or image thumbnails.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) are not open, and the page layout appears normal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target product: 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' (SKU: WBH-001). Main image: 'headphones_main.jpg' (landscape photo). Gallery image: 'headphones_lifestyle.jpg' (portrait photo). Source directory: '/home/ga/Documents/ProductPhotos'. The agent must use the WooCommerce web interface to set the main image and add the gallery image, then update the product.
